CustomField.description: Address field for Container Service Users.
CustomField.formula: CONTAINER_Mailing_Street__c & BR() & If(NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_Street2__c)),CONTAINER_Mailing_Street2__c& BR() , '') + CONTAINER_Mailing_City__c +IF( (NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_City__c )) && NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_State__c ))), ', ' + CONTAINER_Mailing_State__c, CONTAINER_Mailing_State__c) + If (((NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_City__c )) || NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_State__c ))) && NOT( ISBLANK(CONTAINER_Mailing_Zip_Postal_Code__c ))), ','+CONTAINER_Mailing_Zip_Postal_Code__c,CONTAINER_Mailing_Zip_Postal_Code__c) & BR() & CONTAINER_Mailing_Country__c
CustomField.label: Mailing Address
